summary: SMOKE test: Dashboard (admin) and DriverApp render correctly after adding InstallPWAButton. No white screen, no React error overlay, no console errors. InstallPWAButton correctly returns null in headless (beforeinstallprompt does not fire) — expected.
critical_code_review_comments: InstallPWAButton.jsx is clean: properly returns null when !visible, gracefully handles iOS (no beforeinstallprompt), and cleans up event listeners on unmount.
No regressions observed in Dashboard (44 buttons rendered, KPI cards & tiles visible) or DriverApp (driver name 'سائق أحمد' + active order #5001 rendered).
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMOKE only. Admin dashboard URL is '/' after login (not /dashboard). Driver app at /driver-app uses phone+PIN login. Splash blocks ~13-15s after login — waited 18s. InstallPWAButton renders null in headless (expected). Verified: body text length >100, 44 buttons on dashboard, 11 buttons on driver page, 0 console errors, no React error overlay.
